text: Hello. Hi, Cowerman, here. Hi, this is Chelsea, and I'm reaching out because we pulled up your Medicare profile, and there's a note here showing your 2026 plan update hasn't been confirmed yet. We just need a quick confirmation from you, so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. Just confirm for me. Do you have both Part A and Part B?
